commands.review_summary:
This PR makes beta-channel npm plugin updates fall back to the saved/default npm spec when the opportunistic `@beta` package resolves but fails because its TypeScript runtime entry lacks compiled output, with regression coverage and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: a beta-channel update of a default npm spec that returns `invalid_openclaw_extensions` with the compiled-runtime-output message currently falls through to failure instead of retrying the saved spec.
commands.review_followup: This draft, maintainer-labeled PR needs normal maintainer readiness/review rather than an automated repair; no narrow defect was found for ClawSweeper to fix.

target.title: fix(plugins): fall back from invalid beta plugin packages
